dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Hi, I would like to order a large iced americano.
dialogues.translation: 안녕하세요, 사이즈 큰 아이스 아메리카노 하나 주문할게요.

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: Sure. Would you like anything else to eat with that?
dialogues.translation: 네. 같이 드실 만한 다른 것도 필요하신가요?

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: No, just the coffee, please.
dialogues.translation: 아니요, 커피만 주세요.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Are you free this weekend?
dialogues.translation: 이번 주말에 시간 괜찮으세요?

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: I'm free on Sunday afternoon.
dialogues.translation: 일요일 오후에는 시간 돼요.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Great, let's meet at 2 PM.
dialogues.translation: 좋아요, 오후 2시에 만나요.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Could we postpone our meeting to tomorrow?
dialogues.translation: 우리 회의를 내일로 미룰 수 있을까요?

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: Let me check my schedule. Yes, 10 AM works for me.
dialogues.translation: 일정을 확인해 볼게요. 네, 오전 10시가 좋겠네요.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Perfect. I'll send you an updated calendar invite.
dialogues.translation: 완벽해요. 업데이트된 캘린더 초대를 보내드릴게요.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Excuse me, how can I get to the nearest subway station?
dialogues.translation: 실례합니다, 근처 지하철역으로 가려면 어떻게 해야 하나요?

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: Go straight for two blocks, and turn right.
dialogues.translation: 두 블록 직진 후, 오른쪽으로 도세요.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Thank you so much!
dialogues.translation: 정말 감사합니다!

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Hello, I made a reservation under the name John.
dialogues.translation: 안녕하세요, 존이라는 이름으로 예약했습니다.

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: Let me check. Yes, a table for two. Right this way.
dialogues.translation: 확인해 볼게요. 네, 두 분 테이블 맞으시죠. 이쪽으로 오세요.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Have you met our new designer, Sarah?
dialogues.translation: 우리 새 디자이너 새라 만났어?

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: Not yet. I look forward to working with her.
dialogues.translation: 아직이요. 그녀와 함께 일하는 게 기대되네요.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: I'd like to check in, please. Here is my passport.
dialogues.translation: 체크인 부탁드립니다. 제 여권입니다.

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: Thank you. We have you booked for three nights.
dialogues.translation: 감사합니다. 앞으로 3박 묵으시는 것으로 예약되어 있습니다.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Can I try this on in a smaller size?
dialogues.translation: 이거 더 작은 사이즈로 입어볼 수 있을까요?

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: Of course. The fitting room is over there.
dialogues.translation: 물론이죠. 탈의실은 저쪽에 있습니다.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: I really appreciate your help with the project.
dialogues.translation: 프로젝트를 도와주셔서 정말 감사합니다.

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: Don't mention it. We are a team.
dialogues.translation: 별말씀을요. 우리는 팀이잖아요.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: I'm afraid I didn't get the job.
dialogues.translation: 유감스럽지만, 저 그 일자리 못 구했어요.

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: I'm so sorry to hear that. You'll find something better.
dialogues.translation: 그 소식을 들으니 안타깝네요. 분명 더 좋은 곳을 찾을 수 있을 거예요.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Where is the baggage claim for flight 204?
dialogues.translation: 204편 수하물 찾는 곳이 어디인가요?

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: It's carousel number 5, just down this hall.
dialogues.translation: 이 복도 끝에 있는 5번 수하물 벨트입니다.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Your presentation was absolutely brilliant today.
dialogues.translation: 오늘 네 프레젠테이션 정말 훌륭했어.

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: Thank you. I was actually really nervous.
dialogues.translation: 고마워. 사실 정말 긴장했었어.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: I sincerely apologize for the mistake I made.
dialogues.translation: 제가 저지른 실수에 대해 진심으로 사과드립니다.

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: It happens to everyone. Just make sure it doesn't happen again.
dialogues.translation: 누구에게나 일어날 수 있는 일이죠. 다시는 이런 일이 발생하지 않게만 해주세요.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Are we going to meet the deadline for Friday?
dialogues.translation: 우리 금요일 마감 기한을 맞출 수 있을까?

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: It's going to be tight, but we can manage if we focus.
dialogues.translation: 시간이 좀 빠듯하겠지만, 집중하면 어떻게든 될 거야.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Everything is going completely wrong lately.
dialogues.translation: 최근 모든 것이 완전히 엉망이 되고 있어.

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: I'm always here for you if you need to talk.
dialogues.translation: 네가 이야기하고 싶을 때는 언제든 내가 네 곁에 있을게.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: I'd like to return this shirt. It doesn't fit me well.
dialogues.translation: 이 셔츠를 반품하고 싶어요. 저한테 잘 안 맞네요.

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: Do you have the receipt with you?
dialogues.translation: 영수증 가지고 계신가요?

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: What do you usually do on weekends?
dialogues.translation: 주말에는 보통 뭐해?

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: I usually just stay home and watch movies.
dialogues.translation: 나 보통 그냥 집에서 영화 봐.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Is the elevator working?
dialogues.translation: 엘리베이터 작동하나요?

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: No, it's out of order. You have to use the stairs.
dialogues.translation: 아뇨, 고장 났어요. 계단을 이용하셔야 합니다.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: Can you clarify the requirements for this task?
dialogues.translation: 이 업무의 요구사항을 명확히 해 주시겠어요?

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: Sure, I'll send over a detailed email right away.
dialogues.translation: 네, 바로 상세 이메일을 보내드리겠습니다.

dialogues.speaker: A
dialogues.text: I heard you passed the exam. Congratulations!
dialogues.translation: 시험에 합격했다면서. 축하해!

dialogues.speaker: B
dialogues.text: Thanks! I couldn't have done it without you.
dialogues.translation: 고마워! 너가 없었으면 해내지 못했을 거야.
